name: slugify-ai
description: URL slug generation and text normalization. Slugify, deslugify, batch process, and generate SEO-friendly URLs. By MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: slugify
tools.description: Convert text to a URL-friendly slug. Handles Unicode, transliteration, stop words.

tools.name: deslugify
tools.description: Convert a slug back to human-readable text.

tools.name: batch_slugify
tools.description: Batch slugify multiple texts (pipe-separated). E.g. 'Hello World|My Article|New Post'.

tools.name: generate_seo_slug
tools.description: Generate an SEO-optimized slug from a title. Removes stop words, adds optional category/date prefix.
